Make a Reservation
You can now make reservations for The Park Tavern online. Please click the button below to start. We look forward to serving you at Park Tavern. Our service is in a fast-casual style. It is open seating when you arrive. You may place your order at one of our bars and sit inside on our expansive patio.
Become a Park Tavern Insider Today!
Join our new SMS program to unlock secret discounts, menu specials, and first-hand access to restaurant news.
Text Join to 1-866-735-1120
SUBSCRIBE
STAY IN TOUCH
SUBSCRIBE TO OUR NEWSLETTER
By signing up, you agree to receive automated and personalized marketing texts from Park Tavern at the cell phone number used when signing up. Frequency varies and standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to cancel at any point, or HELP for more information.
